title: draba cuneifolia var. helleri
intro: Draba cuneifolia var. helleri, also known as Heller's draba, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Heller's draba are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
